evals.prompt: We decided to use ClickHouse for analytics queries instead of PostgreSQL read replica for the report-service. Write an ADR for this decision.
evals.expected_output: Well-structured ADR following XynPOS format with status, date, context explaining why PG read replica is insufficient, decision to use ClickHouse, rationale, consequences/tradeoffs, and rejected alternatives.
expectations: Konteks explains the problem with current read replica approach
Keputusan is specific about ClickHouse version and use case
